economic_notes: Council holds 14.3% interest in Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership. 100% ownership of Jean Marie River Development Corporation Ltd. and Tthets' Ehk' E Deli Society.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2020. Province coded as NT (Northwest Territories). The nation consolidates Tthets' Ehk' E Deli Society (100%) and Jean Marie River Development Corporation Ltd. (100%) fully, and accounts for Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.3%) using modified equity method. Revenue figure of 2,288,474 is net of deferred revenue adjustments. osr calculated as Other revenue and recoveries only (383,237) since most revenue is government transfers; however the statement shows 5,385,219 as add opening deferred which inflates apparent revenue lines - net recognized revenue is 2,288,474 total. Total government transfers estimated from MACA + ISC + DFN + GNWT + GOC contributions. Audit report signed January 13, 2021, nearly 10 months after year end. No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages. Contributions repayable of $1,162 to Government of NWT-ITI noted.
